meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template for Scaling Apps
content.seo_description: Overcome the plateau of basic app development. Learn how to leverage the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver enterprise-grade SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, eliminate repetitive boilerplate, and integrate Claude Code for automated logic generation. This workflow shifts your focus from manual configuration to high-value feature delivery, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS applications in half the time.
content.intro:
The screen glows at 2:00 AM. You’ve spent six hours wrestling with authentication middleware and database schema migrations—again. It is the classic freelancer's trap: you are infinitely talented, yet perpetually stuck building the same basic scaffolding for every single client, bleeding billable hours on repetitive infrastructure.

There is a better way to operate. By shifting from manual coding to an architecture-first approach using the Antigravity project template, you reclaim your agency. This isn't just about speed; it's about building a repeatable, high-performance engine that allows you to outpace competitors and deliver enterprise-ready solutions with the precision of a senior architect.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-ready foundation using the Antigravity template, which includes pre-configured security, state management, and API routing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with authentication, PostgreSQL integration, and Tailwind CSS configured.

steps.title: Define Domain-Driven Entities
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your business requirements into the Antigravity database schema, ensuring type safety across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with Users, Organizations, and Subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate Prisma schema for multi-tenant SaaS'

steps.title: Automate API Layer Injection
steps.description: Inject business logic into your endpoints without writing boilerplate controllers, utilizing the template's built-in API factory.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for CRUD operations on the User and Organization entities following Antigravity best practices.

steps.title: Implement Frontend Components
steps.description: Rapidly build the UI by mapping your data models to the Antigravity component library, ensuring consistency and responsive design.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a dashboard view that lists all organizations with search, filter, and edit functionality using the Antigravity UI kit.

steps.title: Execute Automated Integration Tests
steps.description: Validate the entire stack by triggering the Antigravity test suite via Claude Code to catch regressions before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the complete suite of integration tests and identify any missing error handling in the authentication flow.

pro_tips: Always use the 'Atomic Commit' strategy when Claude Code suggests changes to ensure you can revert individual business logic modules.
Customize the Antigravity template's base CSS variables once to match your personal brand, then reuse that config across every client project.
Leverage Claude Code's context awareness by keeping your schema documentation in a root /docs folder for more accurate prompt responses.
Use the Antigravity environment variables injection for secret management to avoid hardcoding keys during rapid prototyping phases.
Run periodic architecture audits using Claude Code by pointing it to your main config files to ensure you haven't drifted from your original design patterns.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, deploy your project to a staging environment and run a performance audit to identify any unused template code that can be trimmed for production.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop reinventing the wheel and start scaling your freelance business. By mastering the Antigravity template and Claude Code workflow, you move from a developer to an architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
